name: Graph View
responsibility: React Flow-based git graph visualization for Layer 2. Renders the intent evolution chain (main line) with agent branch forks, merges, drift markers, and abandoned branches. Uses dagre for automatic layout with custom node and edge types.

interfaces.name: IntentGraph

output_schema.renders: Interactive React Flow graph with intent nodes and agent branch edges

interfaces.api_detail: Main component. Fetches graph data via ipc:get_graph_data. Transforms backend data into React Flow nodes and edges. Applies dagre layout (top-to-bottom). Supports pan, zoom, and node click interactions. Pull-up from Layer 1 card animates the graph into view.

interfaces.name: IntentNode
interfaces.api_detail: Custom node component for intent snapshots. Visual encoding: hollow circle for historical versions, filled circle for current (HEAD). Shows version number (v1, v2...) and trigger type badge (initial/refinement/drift_response/auto_inferred). Hover shows full statement text. Click selects and highlights connected branches.

interfaces.name: AgentBranchEdge
interfaces.api_detail: Custom edge component for agent branches. Four visual variants per REQ-003-AC-4: (1) Active branch: solid line in platform color, (2) Completed merge: solid line curving back to intent main line, (3) Abandoned: gray dashed line, (4) Drift: orange pulsing dashed line (CSS animation). Edge label shows platform name and status icon.

interfaces.name: IntentMainLine

output_schema.renders: Purple thick line connecting intent nodes vertically

interfaces.api_detail: The intent evolution backbone. Rendered as a thick purple (#8B5CF6) polyline connecting all IntentSnapshot nodes in version order (top to bottom). This is the visual anchor of the graph.

interfaces.name: AutoFoldManager
interfaces.api_detail: When total nodes exceed threshold (10), collapses early nodes into a single 'folded' placeholder node showing '... v1-v5 (5 versions)'. Click to expand. Always keeps the latest 5 nodes visible. Fold state is local UI state, not persisted.

interfaces.name: graphDataToReactFlow
interfaces.api_detail: Pure function that transforms backend graph data into React Flow format. Creates IntentNode for each snapshot, AgentBranchEdge for each branch (from forked_from_intent_id to branch endpoint). Applies dagre layout. Returns positioned nodes and styled edges.

fields.name: intent
fields.constraints: Registered as custom node type in React Flow

nfr_constraints.performance: Graph render < 300ms for up to 30 nodes (typical max: 8 tasks × 3-4 versions). dagre layout computation < 50ms for 30 nodes. React Flow canvas supports smooth 60fps pan/zoom.
nfr_constraints.other: Drift pulse animation: CSS keyframes with orange glow, 2s cycle. Dark/light mode support inherited from UITheme. Graph is read-only (no drag-to-rearrange) — layout is deterministic from data.
